555 95472Name555 95472FranchisePeanutsGenderMaleFirstMisery, My Sweet BabbooLastRen McCormackVoiced bySeth Green 555 95472is a character from the Peanuts franchise. So far, he has appeared in the skitsMisery, My Sweet BabbooandRen McCormackvoiced bySeth Green.
He has two sisters, named 3 and 4. Misery, My Sweet Babboo: In this skit, 555 is one of the kids who skates on the ice, together withLucy,Pigpen, Frieda, Snoopy and Linus, untilFranklinpoints out that they're late for the christmas rehearsal.Frieda, however, tells him that they just can ignore the one in charge (which isCharlie Brown) and dance repetitively, to which 555 replies that he loves to dance repetitively, and they all leave, ignoringLinuswho got tossed into a tree bySnoopy, leaving him for dead. He is not seen again after this.

characters.name: Abraham Lincoln
characters.description: Abraham LincolnNameAbraham LincolnGenderMaleFirstJedi Master George W.LastLincoln Gets a Good Ass-Kicking InVoiced byHulk Hogan Abraham Lincolnwas the 16th President of the United States, serving from March 1861 until his assassination in April 1865. He was voiced byHulk Hogan. Jedi Master George W.:Lincoln claims to have freed the slaves. In reality, his successor, Andrew Johnson, freed the slaves when he signed the 13th Amendment to the US Constitution.

characters.name: Adam Sandler
characters.description: Adam SandlerNameAdam SandlerGenderMaleFirstAt the MoviesLastTwist EndingsVoiced bySeth Green Adam Richard Sandleris an American actor, comedian, singer, screenwriter, musician, and film producer. He was voiced bySeth Green. He is best known for his comedic roles, such as in the filmsBilly Madison,Happy Gilmoreand the widely-pannedJack and Jill, which garnered a universally negative reception from both critics and viewers. In 1999, Sandler foundedHappy Madison, a film and television production company that has produced numerous films and television series.

characters.name: Amanda Bynes
characters.description: Amanda Laura Bynes (born April 3, 1986) is an American actress and former show host on Nickelodeon. After appearing in several successful television series on Nickelodeon in the late 1990s and early 2000s, Bynes has moved into a film career, starring in several films aimed at teenage audiences, including She's the Man, the film version of the musical Hairspray, Sydney White & Easy A. She was on the 2007 Forbes list as the 5th highest paid celebrity under 21 earning $2.5 million.

characters.name: Andy Davis
characters.description: Andy DavisNameAndy DavisFranchiseToy StoryGenderMaleFirst"Toy Story 4"Last"Xbox Revenge"Voiced bySeth Green Andy Davisis a main character in Pixar'sToy Storyfranchise who appears in two sketches ofRobot Chicken. He is voiced bySeth Green. In the "Toy Story 4" segment of the episode calledKramer Vs. Showgirls, Andy comes home from college for spring break and has sex with a girl. He then says he left his "favorite toy" (a bong) back at college, which upsetWoodyvery much, and then turnsBuzzinto a makeshift bong, leaving Buzz brain-damaged to a level of mental retardation. Later on, Woody ended Buzz's suffering by smothering him to death with a pillow.

characters.name: Aquaman
characters.description: Aquaman is a fictional superhero who appears in comic books published by DC Comics. Created by Paul Norris and Mort Weisinger, the character debuted in More Fun Comics #73 (Sep. 1941). Initially a backup feature in DC's anthology titles, Aquaman later starred in several volumes of a solo title. During the late 1950s and 1960s superhero-revival period known as the Silver Age, he was a founding member of the Justice League of America. In the 1990s Modern Age, Aquaman's character became more serious than in most previous interpretations, with storylines depicting the weight of his role as king of Atlantis. InRobot Chicken, he is normally seen as a wimpy hero who gets little to no respect from the other characters (notably Superman). He was voiced bySeth MacFarlanein his debut and bySeth Greenafterwards.

characters.name: Archie Andrews
characters.description: Archie Andrews, created in 1941 by Vic Bloom and Bob Montana, is a fictional character in an American comic book series published by Archie Comics, as well as the long-running Archie Andrews radio series, a syndicated comic strip, The Archie Show, and Archie's Weird Mysteries. He first appeared inArchie's Final Destination.

characters.name: Astro
characters.description: Astrois a canine character on the Hanna-Barbera cartoon The Jetsons. He first appeared inUnsolved Case Files: I, Rosie. In this segment, Astro is seen alongsideElroy JetsonafterGeorge Jetsonwas murdered. After Elroy tells the audience that he has a new dad, the camera pans over toJane Jetsonsitting on Mr. Spacely's lap. Astro rushes over and tells Spacely to "keep his hands off her", but Spacely ignores him and threats him with neutering. This causes Astro to whimp in fear and crawl back to his food bowl where he pees all over the floor. He was voiced byMike Henry, who also voiced Mr. Spacely in the same segment.

characters.name: Astro Boy
characters.description: Astro Boy Astro Boy, known in Japan by its original nameMighty Atom(Japanese: 鉄腕アトム Hepburn:Tetsuwan Atomu), is a Japanese manga series written and illustrated by Osamu Tezuka from 1952 to 1968. The story follows the adventures of an android named Astro Boy and a selection of other characters.

characters.name: Bambi
characters.description: Bambiis a 1942 American animated drama film directed by David Hand (supervising a team of sequence directors), produced by Walt Disney and based on the bookBambi, A Life in the Woodsby Austrian author Felix Salten. The film was released by RKO Radio Pictures on August 13, 1942, and is the fifth film in the Walt Disney Animated Classics series. The main characters are Bambi, a white-tailed deer, his parents (the Great Prince of the forest and his late unnamed mother), his friends Thumper (a pink-nosed rabbit), and Flower (a skunk), and his childhood friend and future mate, Faline. For the movie, Disney took the liberty of changing Bambi's species into a white-tailed deer from his original species of roe deer, since roe deer do not inhabit the United States, and the white-tailed deer is more familiar to Americans. The film received three Academy Award nominations: Best Sound (Sam Slyfield), Best Song (for "Love Is a Song" sung by Donald Novis) and Original Music Score.

characters.name: Barney
characters.description: Barney T. Dinosaur(or simply just Barney) is a two hundred million year old purple dinosaur with a green stomach, green spots on his back and tail along with yellow toenails, who comes to life through a child's imagination. He is best known for his friendly, optimistic (and even generous) personality and his positive attitude. He loves to get hugs. His theme song is the "Barney Theme Song" (or "Barney is a Dinosaur" to the tune of "Yankee Doodle"). His other well known song is "I Love You," which has been parodied by many people and the tune is sung slowly to "This Old Man". Barney likes most kinds of food, but his favorite is a peanut butter and jelly sandwich, presumably with pumpernickel bread, which is his favorite bread. According to Barney's Campfire Sing-Along, veggies are also a favorite of his.

characters.name: Barney and Friends
characters.description: Barney & Friendsis a popular children's television show produced in the United States, mainly aimed at preschoolers and toddlers. Barney is a purple anthropomorphic Tyrannosaurus rex who conveys learning through jumping around singing children's songs with a friendly, optimistic attitude.

characters.name: Barney Rubble
characters.description: Bernard "Barney" Rubbleis a fictional character who appears in the television animated seriesThe Flintstones. He is the diminutive, blonde-haired caveman husband ofBetty Rubbleand adoptive father ofBamm-Bamm Rubble. His best friends are his next door neighbors, Fred andWilma Flintstone. He first appeared in "Cereal Killer". In this segment, Barney distracts his friendFred Flintstoneby sending him a letter written on a paper (which he invented himself), in order to steal his fruity pebbles. However, the brawl between the two friends goes a little too far, when Barney accidentally kills Fred by hitting him in the head hard with a club, after Fred started punching him violently. After burying Fred's corpse, he kills off all the tools and equipment (includingDino) who witnessed the accidental murder. After a while, Wilma and Betty return home, only to find all the animals murdered in big puddles of blood, before finding Barney showering in a bird inside a pig's mouth. Barney was later seen on the gallows, where he was hanged. He was voiced byStephen Stanton. In this sketch, he assisted Fred in killingGreat Gazoo. He was once again voiced byStephen Stanton.
